title: Foundation & Core Framework
items: Initial bot setup with a modular and recursive command handler.
Implemented per-server prefix system (r) with case-insensitive detection.
Added auto-healing JSON initialization for configuration persistence.
Integrated UnbelievaBoat economy with optimized Axios requests.
Launched High/Low betting game with interactive buttons.
Implemented ImageGuess (Gartic) with Pixabay and Jimp image processing.

title: Minigame Maturity & Dashboard
items: Launched the Multiplayer Host-Funded Werewolf game system.
Implemented an interactive Setup Dashboard for game masters.
Added dedicated game channel restrictions (rgamechannel).
Introduced per-game cooldowns and custom delays (rdelay).
Modernized the help system with dropdown categories and buttons.

title: Engine Stability & Deployment
items: Overhauled Werewolf engine with manual commands and team chat.
Added live skip progress logic and alive/dead player lists to embeds.
Implemented partial matching logic for more lenient ImageGuessing.
Hardened file pathing for seamless Wispbyte hosting compatibility.
Fixed interaction collisions and duplicate embed declarations.

title: Wispbyte & UX Core
items: Forced .env priority to fix 'Invalid Token' errors on Wispbyte.
Added token sanitization (trim/quote removal) for safety.
Self-healing configuration system for missing/corrupted files.
Permission-based help menu (hides admin cmds from members).

title: Werewolf: Tactical Overhaul
items: Player Indexing (1, 2, 3...) for fast targeting.
Secret DM commands for Wolves and Seers.
Tactical Vote Cancellation during the Day phase.
20% Prize Tax and Seer scan limits (default 2).

title: The Social & Logging Update
items: Collaborative 'Death Stories' for Werewolves via standalone commands.
Unified persistent DM log embeds for the Host and all Players.
Standalone DM commands (skip, wsay, how) requiring no prefix.
Winner summaries now pushed to persistent logs at endgame.

title: Persistence & Metadata
items: Migrated from Git-based 'commits' to local 'updates.json' storage.
Added support for rich, multi-line update descriptions.
Enhanced update embeds with better visibility and organization.

title: Dynamic DM Dashboard & Shorthands
items: Updated DM log embeds to show only relevant commands for your role/phase.
Added prefix-less support for 'v [ID]' (vote) and 'unvote' in DMs.
Added auto-highlighting (➡️) for the player's own name in their DM logs.
Synchronized Seer scan counts and Werewolf shortcuts across all DMs.

title: Decentralization & Performance
items: Decentralized Economy: Added per-server UnbelievaBoat linking with live API validation (rrunbtoken).
Memory Caching: Implemented global memory collections for prefixes and settings, drastically reducing disk I/O.
Robust Restrictions: Minigames now verify channel existence before blocking commands to prevent deadlocks.
Modernized UI/UX: Fixed deprecated ephemeral flags and updated technical guides with precise Bot Client ID steps.
File Cleanup: Removed redundant source files to maintain a lean and professional directory structure.

title: The Competition & Organization Update
items: New Game: Launched the 'bet' command for 50/50 PvP gambling with other users.
Help Overhaul: Consolidated all games into a single 'Minigames' category for a cleaner dropdown menu.
Categorized Help: Minigame help is now split into 'Games' and 'Game Settings' with polished descriptions.
Visual Feedback: Added 🗳️ (ballot box) icons for voters in Werewolf and improved 'Ready' visibility.
Smarter Loader: Refactored the command engine to support nested folder categorization and type tagging.

title: The Economy & Integration Update
items: Economy Suite: Launched fully linked UnbelievaBoat commands: balance, leaderboard, withdraw, and deposit.
Visual Aesthetics: Styled economy responses to match UnbelievaBoat's minimalist design and signature color palette.
Interactive Leaderboard: Added 'Next' and 'Previous' buttons for seamless browsing of server rankings.
Smart Shorthand: Economy commands now support k, m, b, t multipliers (e.g., 10k, 1m) for faster transactions.
Admin Aliases: winningrate and checkwinningrate (cwr) now support game aliases like 'hl' for 'highlow'.
Cooldown Reminders: Added highlowping (hlp) to notify users exactly when they can play HighLow again.
Stability Fixes: Implemented API cache-busting and robust data parsing to ensure leaderboard accuracy.
Global Silence: Disabled replied-user pings across all commands for a less intrusive user experience.
HighLow Draw: Ties no longer result in a loss or fine; it is now a neutral draw.
Refined Defaults: Cleaned up global winning rates to correctly apply only to HighLow.
Minimalist Economy: Removed avatars from withdraw/deposit messages for a cleaner look.

title: The Polish & Peer-to-Peer Update
items: P2P Transfers: Added give-money (aliases: give, pay) to transfer cash to other members with full shorthand support.
Visual Refinement: Standardized 'no avatar/name' format for economy embeds to ensure a clean, consistent UI.
Reliable Pings: Upgraded HighLow cooldown reminders to use replies, ensuring notifications trigger reliably on mobile.
Text Alignment: Updated deposit and withdraw responses to match UnbelievaBoat's exact phrasing for a seamless experience.
Unified Palette: Synced the leaderboard color with the rest of the economy suite for a more cohesive design.

title: The Centralized Economy & Monitoring Update
items: Architecture Consolidation: Merged fragmented server configuration files into a centralized system for better performance and easier management.
Max Balance Monitor: Implemented an automated background audit system that enforces server-specific currency caps via the UnbelievaBoat API.
Dynamic Enforcement: Members can now earn infinitely by default unless a limit is set, with a 10B default cap for the main server.
New Control Command: Added maxbalance (aliases: maxbal, mb) to allow server owners to configure or disable currency limits.
Auto-Migration: Added a smart initialization system that automatically transitions legacy data to the new structure on startup.
Optimized Performance: Refactored all game and administrative commands to utilize memory caches for faster response times.

title: The Reactive Security & Optimization Update
items: Reactive Audits: Implemented instant balance checks after every minigame win (Bet, HighLow, ImageGuess, Werewolf) to enforce limits in real-time.
Optimized Audit Timing: Switched background audits to a 3-hour interval to drastically reduce API overhead and server load.
Silent Background Logs: Cleaned up the console by redirecting background debug messages to bot_logs.txt while keeping the UI clear for important events.
Stability Fix: Resolved 'MaxListenersExceeded' warnings by increasing internal EventEmitter limits to accommodate large-scale server audits.
Synchronized Deployment: Updated all core files and backup zips to ensure latest optimizations are included in future server migrations.

title: The Social Identity & Architecture Update
items: New Game: Launched 'Name Guesser' (rng), a host-driven social identity game with a 'Who Am I?' mechanic.
Advanced Engine: Implemented a robust multi-phase state machine for image collection, titling, and turn-based questioning.
Cross-DM Interaction: Added seamless voting and guessing logic that bridges private DMs and server channels.
Host Authority: Empowered hosts with 'Trump' decision power for voting and manual guess validation to account for typos.
Ranked Payouts: Integrated dynamic prize splitting for multiple winners with automated UnbelievaBoat settlement.
Architecture Overhaul: Completely updated documentation and optimized DM command routing for modularity.

title: The NameGuesser UI/UX Overhaul
items: Single-Message UI: Consolidated the entire game state into a single, persistent 'Game Log' dashboard.
Anti-Spam Architecture: Replaced separate prompts and notifications with a unified, auto-updating embed system.
Dynamic Dashboard: Implemented a 'Delete and Resend' strategy to keep the game at the bottom of the chat without cluttering history.
Self-Cleaning DMs: Added turn notifications in DMs that automatically delete themselves after a player takes action.
Sequential Setup: Launched a streamlined 'Bulk Upload & Name' flow for faster game preparation.
Impactful Revelations: Added a revelation system that displays a winner's identity and image in both the channel and DMs.
Fair Play Enforcement: Implemented a 3-question limit for 'Yes' answers and mandatory turn passing for incorrect guesses.
Reliability Fallbacks: Added dynamic manual command instructions to all embed footers as a backup for button failures.

title: The Activity Verification & Role Automation Update
items: New Feature: Launched Activity Role Events (AR) allowing admins to set custom message requirements for roles.
Stateless Architecture: Implemented a high-performance verification engine that uses API history fetching instead of disk storage.
Optimized Audits: Integrated a 5-minute per-user cooldown and 100-message batching to prevent Discord API rate limits.
Dual-Storage Logic: Main server configurations are now saved directly to default_myserver.json, while others use a dedicated ar_configs.json.
Admin Control Suite: Added comprehensive commands (ar setup, list, del, setcount, setrole) for real-time requirement management.
Arcane Integration: Automated role issuance triggered by both message activity and Arcane Bot level-up events.

title: The Cloud-Native Revolution Update
items: Database Migration: Migrated all server configurations (prefixes, games, roles) from local JSON to MongoDB Atlas.
Dedicated Token Vault: Isolated UnbelievaBoat API tokens into a secure, dedicated collection for enhanced security.
Zero-Disk Architecture: Successfully removed all local storage files (custom_guilds.json, ar_configs.json, default_myserver.json).
Automatic Migration Engine: Implemented a one-time startup logic to seamlessly move legacy server data to the Cloud.
Performance Optimization: Developed a high-speed memory cache synchronized with MongoDB for sub-millisecond latency.
DM Logic Refactor: Isolated all prefix-less game interactions into a dedicated dmHandler.js for maximum stability.
Full Game Sync: Refactored HighLow, Bet, and ImageGuess to use Cloud-native settings and win rates.

title: The Interactive Dashboard & Modular Requirement Update
items: Interactive Dashboard: Launched a button-based edit menu (r ar edit) with real-time feedback and Modal-driven configuration.
Modular Architecture: Refactored the core system to support multiple requirement types, starting with 'Requirement Messages' (req msgs).
Intelligent Logging: Implemented 'Current Channel' (same) logging logic that celebrates role grants in the user's active channel.
Chat-Based Selectors: Replaced technical IDs with a user-friendly chat collector for log channel selection, supporting mentions and links.
Terminology Purge: Completely removed legacy 'Threshold' branding across the entire codebase, UI, and documentation.
Auto-Cleanup: Implemented self-deleting prompts and responses for a zero-clutter administrative experience.
Performance Tuning: Optimized internal verification logic and upgraded interaction responses to the latest Discord.js standards.

title: The Role Store & Inventory Automation Update
items: New Feature: Launched a premium Role Store Utility letting admins sell server roles using the UnbelievaBoat economy.
Pricing Models: Added support for both Fixed Pricing (one-time purchase) and Rent Mode (dynamic daily renting where users buy custom days).
Inventory Management: Added a database-backed inventory system (r ri) to track purchased roles, dormant durations, and active wearers.
Activation & Gifting: Designed a dynamic activation engine (r ur) allowing users to wear roles, gift/equip them on friends, or return them to inventory.
Interactive Dashboard: Implemented a button-and-modal driven configuration panel (r br setup) featuring Discord's native RoleSelectMenuBuilder.
Subscription Automation: Integrated an optimized background worker scanning every 3 hours to automatically strip expired temporary roles.
One-Click DM Renewals: Programmed automated private DM warnings containing a one-click renewal button to instantly restart timers.

title: Name Guesser Database Persistence & Control Upgrades
items: Database Logging: Integrated MongoDB logging for Name Guesser, capturing all questions, guesses, and actions in real-time.
Time-To-Live Deletion: Configured automatic 30-minute MongoDB TTL self-cleaning to purge logs half an hour after a match ends.
Log History Query: Added 'ng history' and 'ng history @player' commands to retrieve current or past match logs within the 30-minute window.
Anti-Spam UI Edits: Overhauled log updates to use Discord message edits in channels and DMs, eliminating duplicate and orphaned messages.
Log Slicing & Queuing: Sliced live logs to the last 12 events to safely fit inside Discord's 4,096 character limit, and added an update lock queue.
DM Compatibility & Routing: Resolved message compatibility bugs in DMs (author vs user property checks) and enabled prefix-less 'ng' routing in DMs.
Immediate Host Override: Host votes now immediately resolve rounds, bypassing remaining player votes and blocking late inputs.
Prefix-less DM Voting: Enabled quick prefix-less 'yes'/'no'/'y'/'n' votes in DMs with explicit confirmation replies.
Host Kick Command: Added 'ng kick <@player>' command to allow hosts to remove players mid-game or from the lobby.

title: Live Web Presence Sync & Command Upgrades
items: Intents Expansion: Enabled GuildPresences and GuildMembers gateway intents to track status changes and server member details.
Mongoose Schema Sync: Added a Presence schema to record user statuses, active roles, dynamic avatars, and custom activity updates in MongoDB.
Real-Time Listeners: Wired presenceUpdate and guildMemberUpdate events to automatically sync live changes directly to the cloud.
On-Demand Command: Created websync (alias ws) command restricted to bot owners to trigger bulk synchronization on command.
Startup Synchronization: Automatically runs a full guild synchronization on ready, consolidating logs to a clean single-line summary.
Startup Ready Notifications: Sends an online confirmation message directly to the server's dedicated text channel upon successful connection.
Local Test Dashboard: Created a public webtest project containing a backend Express API and a premium glassmorphic frontend UI.

Genshin Countdown (gpc): Launched a countdown command for upcoming Genshin Impact banners, scraping release times, stitching multiple images vertically using sharp/composite, and pushing a live countdown embed.

HGM Broadcast System: Added owner-only broadcast list manager (hgm add/remove/list/text/pm) and custom DM handlers for secure member list messaging, message exclusions, and prefix-less DM reply forwarding.

title: Web Presence Enhancements & DM Stability
items: Role Hierarchy Position: Updated presence schema and sync scripts to store role hierarchy ranks, enabling correct role sorting in the web presence database.
Custom Activity & Emotes: Patched web presence sync to accurately capture status emotes and live custom activities.
DM Message Routing Fixes: Resolved silent errors handling partial messages in DMs and enabled direct DM notifications to bot owners upon startup.

title: Cloud-Native Settings, WebSync Change Streams, & Expiration Fixes
items: Game Settings Migration: Transitioned High/Low betting game configuration (highlowping) from server_game_settings.json to MongoDB Guild cache.
WebSync Queue Watcher: Integrated a Change Stream listener for SyncRequests with a fallback database poll and a 5-minute global cooldown.
Role Expiration Overhaul: Fixed inventory cleanups by pruning expired temporary roles whether they are active or dormant.
Database Reconnect Logging: Added explicit console confirmations when the bot successfully reconnects to MongoDB.
